name: Grid Sweeper
name_jp: グリッド・スィーパー
desc: If a face-up Field Spell is in any Field Zone: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can banish this card in your GY and 1 Link Monster you control; destroy 1 card your opponent controls. You can only use each effect of "Grid Sweeper" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a face-up Field Spell is in any Field Zone: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can banish this card in your GY and 1 Link Monster you control; destroy 1 card your opponent controls. You can only use each effect of "Grid Sweeper" once per turn.
eff: If a face-up Field Spell is in any Field Zone: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can banish this card in your GY and 1 Link Monster you control; destroy 1 card your opponent controls. You can only use each effect of "Grid Sweeper" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
